title: Cruise Ship Hit by Hantavirus Leaves Canary Islands and Sails Toward Netherlands
summary_full: The last evacuees disembarked in the Canary Islands, and a smaller crew is now en route to Rotterdam, where the ship will be disinfected, officials said.
summary_public: The last evacuees disembarked in the Canary Islands, and a smaller crew is now en route to Rotterdam, where the ship will be disinfected, officials said.
